backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder for backend logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature to change 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir' in the About component's mentors list.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the Cariesrisk AI promotional website structure, components, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a dental-themed color palette using OKLCH values for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Cariesrisk AI React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component orchestrating the page layout with Header, Hero, Features, About, CallToAction, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying mission statement, benefits list, team members (Pramit, Aaryaman, Vansh, Khushi, Radhika, Kashish), and mentors (Onkar sir, Debadip sir, Hari sir) with a decorative tooth illustration.
frontend/src/components/CallToAction.tsx: CTA section encouraging dental professionals to request a demo or contact sales, highlighting fast setup and HIPAA compliance.
frontend/src/components/Features.tsx: Features section displaying six cards with icons and descriptions covering AI analysis, risk assessment, early detection, and preventive care benefits.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with logo, navigation links, company information, smooth scroll functionality for 'About Us', and attribution to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, navigation menu (Features, About Us, Contact), and smooth scrolling with offset handling for section navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component displaying the main landing page banner with title, description, CTA buttons, and statistics cards for a pediatric dental risk assessment AI application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file reserved for future React Query hooks when backend integration methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining a mint green and white dental-themed color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking architectural notes, known issues, and existing features including a pending request to change a mentor name from 'Omkar sir' to 'Onkar sir' in the About component.
